description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided wooden advertising board with a classic A-frame design. Each side features a large, rectangular display area bordered by a thick, medium-brown wooden frame. The front panel displays a stylized illustration of an angelic figure with outstretched wings and the text 'THE TOWER PROTECTS THE LAMB FROM THE FALSE SHEPHERD.' The reverse side shows a dramatic hand with the letters 'AD' and the text 'YOU SHALL KNOW THE FALSE SHEPHERD BY HIS MARK!' Both panels are visually striking, with vibrant purples, reds, and golds, and are set into the wooden frame. The board is supported by two angled wooden legs connected at the top by a hinge and stabilized by a metal chain near the base. The overall construction suggests durability and portability, suitable for placement on sidewalks or in public urban spaces.
description: A double-sided, freestanding wooden A-frame advertising board with vivid illustrated posters and a sturdy, thick wooden frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing an illustrated angelic figure and protective text within a thick wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the A-frame structure, hinge at the top, and stabilizing metal chain between the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a dramatic hand illustration with bold text, framed by the same thick wooden border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the angled wooden legs and the connecting chain, with no visible poster details.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with straight edges and visible hinge at the top
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed posters with illustrated graphics and bold text
